page.content: In the 2Q FY2025 report for Revolut, the Buy-Now-Pay-Later metrics indicate a Default Rate of 2.3%, up from 1.8% in Q1 FY2025 and 1.5% in Q2 FY2024, reflecting a YoY Change of 30.6%. Total Loans amount to $450M, an increase from $400M in Q1 FY2025 and $350M in Q2 FY2024, representing a Growth Rate of 12.5%, with a YoY Increase of 1.5%.

lines.text: In the 2Q FY2025 report for Revolut, the Buy-Now-Pay-Later metrics indicate a Default Rate of 2.3%, up from 1.8% in Q1
FY2025 and 1.5% in Q2 FY2024, reflecting a YoY Change of 30.6%. Total Loans amount to $450M, an increase from $400M
in Q1 FY2025 and $350M in Q2 FY2024, representing a Growth Rate of 12.5%, with a YoY Increase of 1.5%.

page.content: The Debt/Equity Ratio stands at 1.2, compared to 1.1 in the previous quarter and 1.0 a year ago, while the Current Ratio is 2.5, up from 2.4 in Q1 FY2025 and 2.3 in Q2 FY2024. The Price-to-Earnings Ratio is reported at 15.0, increasing from 14.5 and 14.0 in the prior periods. The Profit Margin is at 18.0%, compared to 17.5% and 17.0%, and Customer Growth is 5.0%, up from 4.5% and 4.0%. Market Share is documented at 10.2%, an improvement from 9.8%.

page.content: In the Financial Metrics table, Total Revenue is $150M with a Growth Rate of 25% and Total Transactions reaching 1.2M, while Domestic Revenue is $120M and International Revenue amounts to $30M, contributing to a Profit Margin of 20%.
